name: AMERICAN EXPRESS CO
summary: American Express is a global payments and premium lifestyle company founded in 1850 and headquartered in New York. It operates card-issuing, merchant-acquiring, and card network businesses offering credit and charge cards, banking products, travel and dining services, and expense management solutions to consumers, small businesses, mid-sized companies, and large corporations worldwide. For 2025, worldwide billed business was $1,670 billion with 86.6 million proprietary cards-in-force.

products.name: Credit and Charge Cards
products.description: General purpose credit and charge cards for consumers, small businesses, mid-sized companies, and large corporations worldwide.

products.name: Membership Rewards
products.description: Loyalty rewards program providing incentives and points redeemable with partners including Delta Air Lines and Amazon.

products.name: Amex Offers
products.description: Targeted offers and statement credits for Card Members for purchases with merchant partners.

products.name: High Yield Savings and Checking Accounts
products.description: Banking products including high yield savings and business and consumer checking accounts.

products.name: Consumer Installment Loans
products.description: Non-card lending and installment loan products offered to consumers.

products.name: OptBlue
products.description: Merchant-acquiring program enabling third parties to contract with small merchants for American Express card acceptance.

products.name: Resy and Tock
products.description: Dining reservation platforms providing Card Members elevated dining experiences and restaurant network access.

products.name: Amex Travel App
products.description: Digital travel application launched in 2025 to help Card Members engage with products, benefits, and travel services.

products.name: B2B Payment Products
products.description: Non-card business-to-business payment products and cash and expense management solutions for commercial clients.

products.name: Card Network Services
products.description: Global payments network processing and settling transactions; licenses American Express brand to third-party issuers in ~110 countries.

partnerships.description: Largest strategic partner; cobrand card issuing, Membership Rewards participation, lounge access, and corporate payments.
